question: Did COVID-19 vaccine officials ignore most available safety data when making recommendations?
topic: Addresses specific allegation about data transparency that fuels broader vaccine misinformation

sources.name: Vaccine Safety Research, Data Access, and Public Trust

discovery_sources.text: Vaccines & Immunization: Officials ‘missed 99% of data’ on Covid vaccines before making recommendation, memos reveal
Vaccines & Immunization: Officials ‘missed 99% of data’ before ending Covid vaccine recommendation, memos reveal
